title: Dimension Transfer
overview: Kon was getting nowhere in the game until a character by the name of Flora asked for his help in the “real world”.

title: Erecpyle Dukakis
overview: After his defeat to Kon, Erec has been left lopsided. Meanwhile, Kon wants to find a way home but the Princess has other plans.

title: Newcomer vs. Kon
overview: While Erec deals with the loss of another family jewel. Kon is in a battle against a furry little creature.

title: Pretty kama
overview: Erec has returned home to recover, a plot against honor and family is hatched against him.

title: Beautiful Life
overview: Marian is a trap, something Kon keeps forgetting. When he ask about Marian's back story, the story he is given is…expected.

title: Highness Guardians
overview: The group has never been in more danger than now. The princess has entered her hyperactivity period and no person, city, or country is safe if she reaches her danger zone.

title: Keep On
overview: What should have been a relaxing trip to the hot springs and complicated by Kon’s glowing inability to control his self and that Erec is staying at the same inn.

title: Shining Master
overview: Kon-trol, Kon-sumer, Kon-vention, Kon-pact, Kon-vict?

title: Incognito Trail
overview: Erecpyle travels with the mysterious beauty Alma Flora to retrieve a new weapon; meanwhile the announcement of his return has caused his subordinates to fight for the honor of Erec’s right hand man.

title: Home Sick
overview: Kon has seemed to have lost his mind and reverted back to his days as an anti-social gamer nerd. The princess has ordered Marion and Sainglain to bring him back to his senses.

title: Unexpected Victory
overview: A surprise attack by Erec and his men with their new super weapons leave Kon and crew running for their lives. In the aftermath, each group is left with a prisoner of war to “interrogate”.

title: Behavioral Examination
overview: Gustave has taken it upon himself to observe Marion and Sanglain following the death of the Princess and DT. But KT thinks Gustave is in the city of Marquesas for other reasons.

title: Accidental Contact
overview: After Kon and Ecarlate faked their death, the group finally can travel without worry. However, a crazy, misunderstanding young girl changes all that.

title: Evidence Veiled
overview: While the group debates the best way to continue on to the capital, Kon discovers something interesting about their furry little friend.

title: Midnight Trial
overview: Kon just wants to make it to the library but will uncover the capitals many hidden societies, whether he likes it or not.

title: Hit Back
overview: Incognito has been ordered on stand by and therefore unable to track the still alive Kon. But that won’t stop one member from sneaking aboard the Lords airship and putting a bullet into his enemies.

title: Bridal Service
overview: Kon answers on how to get home are at the research center, but when he makes it the lab chief will not give up any answers without payment.

title: Formality and Obstruction
overview: Kon performs wedding rituals on behalf of the princess, becoming increasingly more frustrated with each new one.

title: Off Key
overview: The cowlick is back and the Princess wants to sing.

title: Xing Point
overview: Ecarlate and Jugglaburk will spend their first night together and Ecarlate is prepared to fulfill her duties. Kon is beside himself and can’t handle the atmosphere.

title: Metamorphose at Gate
overview: The Mysterious woman has brought Ecarlate and her group along with Erec and his team to tell them the reason behind everything.

title: Before Crisis
overview: The beginning of the group, Incognito, is a unique tale that requires sharing.

title: No Margin
overview: The easy part was becoming a Hyperion; the hard part is dealing with family.

title: Knighthood
overview: It’s an all-out war between the Empire, Jugglaburk, and the hidden hand of the Ulga.

title: Kon of Knack
overview: Archbishop Taulepton and Ulga Sorority unleash their final weapon: the ultra giant Forezo. Kon must defeat it at all cost.
